title: Toro's Auto Attack
description: Highly customizable mod that allows players to automatically attack while being afk
body:
Toro's Auto Attack

  • For Minecraft Fabric 1.18-26
  • Client-side mod
  • Works even when minecraft is minimized. (Multiplayer/Lan only)
  • The attacks are timed perfectly to maximize damage.
  • Default toggle keybind is "J" but you can change it anytime at Options>Controls>Key Binds>Auto Attack
  • The mod works on both single & multiplayer
  • Requires Fabric API 
  • Requires OwO Lib (1.18.X - 1.21.10)
  • Requires Cloth Config (since 1.12.11)
  • Requires Mod Menu

If you have any suggestions for future updates please write them in my discord server!

Be careful with using it on multiplayer servers as it might be considered as cheating!
